inputs.fcf_source: FY2025 operating cash flow $11470.0M less capital spending $600.0M ÷ 632.0M diluted shares per ACN/investor-documents/sec-edgar/10-K_20251010_rpt20250831_acc0001467373_25_000217.htm
inputs.normalization_note: FY2025 FCF per share anchors owner cash; business optimization cash costs already in reported OCF; Gen AI reinvention embedded in growth path.

bear.notes: AI commoditizes consulting; bookings stagnate; margin compression toward low-teens

base.notes: Managed services + reinvention offset consulting cyclicality; mid-teens margins hold

bull.notes: Gen AI drives share gains and higher-value managed work; bookings re-accelerate

option_scan.question: GAAP book misstates core assets?
option_scan.evidence: Asset-light services model; no land/NAV misstatement (10-K FY2025)

option_scan.question: Backlog / contracted revenue not in FCF path?
option_scan.evidence: Managed services ~50% of revenue growing 9% FY2025; RPO recognized over time

option_scan.question: Embedded product option in revenue?
option_scan.evidence: $3B Gen AI investment; separate gen_ai_reinvention_option component

growth_explanation.mechanism: Managed-services mix shift (9% FY2025 growth vs consulting 6%) plus Gen AI reinvention spend; partially offset by business optimization and wage inflation
growth_explanation.bear_falsifier: Bookings local-currency growth stays flat or negative for four consecutive quarters
growth_explanation.bull_falsifier: Managed services growth re-accelerates above 10% with stable adjusted operating margin

component_valuation.coverage_statement: Four additive components map consulting and managed-services owner cash, Gen AI reinvention option, net financial claims, and IT-cycle/AI disruption reserve once each.

valuation.evidence: Primary bridge from ACN/investor-documents/sec-edgar/10-K_20251010_rpt20250831_acc0001467373_25_000217.htm: FY2025 revenue $69673.0M, OCF $11470.0M, FCF $10870.0M, cash $11478.7M, debt $5034.2M; contract backfill 2026-07-21.
valuation.cross_check: Reconcile to FY2025 10-K and Q2 FY2026 10-Q before decision use.
valuation.falsifier: Primary evidence shows claim, cash conversion, or capital structure is materially worse than low case.

inputs.label: FY2025 net cash provided by operating activities
FY2025 payments to acquire property, plant and equipment
FY2025 diluted shares (net income / diluted EPS)

assumptions.label: Normalized owner free cash flow per diluted share
assumptions.rationale: FY2025 operating cash flow less capital spending per diluted share; business optimization charges already in reported OCF.

assumptions.label: Growth years 1–5
assumptions.rationale: Lawrence bear/base/bull owner-cash growth from valuation.json.

assumptions.label: Growth years 6–7
assumptions.rationale: Fade after managed-services mix stabilizes.

assumptions.label: Required return on owner cash
assumptions.rationale: Premium compounder bounds; not the stance gate.

assumptions.label: Selling multiple in year 7
assumptions.rationale: Lawrence exit multiples 14× / 16× / 19× on year-10 cash path.

assumptions.label: Component schedule adjustment factor
assumptions.rationale: Preserves component schedule while filing facts anchor FY2025 FCF per share.

components.label: Generative AI reinvention and managed-services upside option

valuation.evidence: Primary bridge from ACN/investor-documents/sec-edgar/10-K_20251010_rpt20250831_acc0001467373_25_000217.htm: FY2025 revenue $69673.0M, OCF $11470.0M, FCF $10870.0M, cash $11478.7M, debt $5034.2M; contract backfill 2026-07-21.
valuation.cross_check: Reconcile to FY2025 10-K and Q2 FY2026 10-Q before decision use.
valuation.falsifier: Primary evidence shows claim, cash conversion, or capital structure is materially worse than low case.

assumptions.label: Risk-adjusted Gen AI reinvention and managed-services upside
assumptions.rationale: Non-overlapping claim on enterprise Gen AI reinvention spend beyond normalized FCF engine; Q2 FY2026 bookings stabilization supports base band.

calculations.label: Gen AI reinvention option per share

driver_model.timing_basis: Enterprise reinvention programs convert over 3–5 years.

components.label: Net cash and debt claims on common equity

valuation.evidence: Primary bridge from ACN/investor-documents/sec-edgar/10-K_20251010_rpt20250831_acc0001467373_25_000217.htm: FY2025 revenue $69673.0M, OCF $11470.0M, FCF $10870.0M, cash $11478.7M, debt $5034.2M; contract backfill 2026-07-21.

inputs.label: Long-term debt and capital lease obligations

assumptions.label: Cash required for global payroll and working capital
assumptions.rationale: Judgment on non-distributable operating liquidity for ~779K employees.

assumptions.label: Net financial claim on common equity after debt and operating minimum
assumptions.rationale: Filing-locked cash less long-term debt; low stresses trapped liquidity and refinancing.

components.label: IT spending cycle and AI labor-substitution stress reserve

valuation.evidence: Primary bridge from ACN/investor-documents/sec-edgar/10-K_20251010_rpt20250831_acc0001467373_25_000217.htm: FY2025 revenue $69673.0M, OCF $11470.0M, FCF $10870.0M, cash $11478.7M, debt $5034.2M; contract backfill 2026-07-21.
valuation.cross_check: Reconcile to FY2025 10-K and Q2 FY2026 10-Q before decision use.
valuation.falsifier: Primary evidence shows claim, cash conversion, or capital structure is materially worse than low case.

assumptions.label: IT spending cycle and AI labor-substitution stress reserve
assumptions.rationale: Negative reserve for consulting commoditization, wage inflation, and margin compression not fully embedded in core owner-cash capitalization.

calculations.label: IT cycle and AI disruption reserve per share

trigger.policy: A complete economic-value analysis is required when any trigger fires; otherwise it is recommended.

economic_claim.description: One diluted share of ACN, including consulting and managed-services owner cash, Gen AI reinvention upside, net financial claims, and IT-cycle/AI disruption reserve.
economic_claim.enterprise_to_equity_reconciliation: Consolidated services engine valued through owner-cash discount on FY2025 FCF per share; Gen AI option, net liquidity, and disruption reserve are separate overlap keys.

economic_value_analysis.accounting_reference: FY2025 10-K: stockholders' equity ~$31.2B; economic value in normalized owner cash ($17.1994/sh), not GAAP book alone.

component_groups.label: Consulting and managed-services owner-cash engine
component_groups.economic_claim: Global consulting and managed-services normalized free cash flow
component_groups.valuation_basis: Owner-cash discount on FY2025 FCF per diluted share.
component_groups.adjustments: Business optimization charges already in OCF; managed-services mix shift supports base growth.

component_groups.label: Generative AI reinvention and managed-services upside option
component_groups.economic_claim: Incremental enterprise Gen AI reinvention monetization beyond normalized FCF
component_groups.valuation_basis: Risk-adjusted milestone value on reinvention bookings upside.
component_groups.adjustments: Not in Lawrence base FCF path; Q2 FY2026 bookings stabilization supports base band.

risk_and_timing.probability_basis: Base ~45% that Gen AI reinvention sustains mid-single-digit bookings growth; low case zero.
risk_and_timing.timing_basis: Enterprise reinvention programs convert over 3–5 years per FY2025 10-K disclosures.
risk_and_timing.remaining_capital_basis: $3B Gen AI investment since 2023; ~$1B remaining run-rate in proof judgment band.

component_groups.label: Net cash and debt claims on common equity
component_groups.economic_claim: Net corporate liquidity after long-term debt and operating minimum
component_groups.valuation_basis: Net asset value on filing-locked cash less debt.
component_groups.adjustments: Operating cash minimum judgment; no double-count with core engine.

component_groups.label: IT spending cycle and AI labor-substitution stress reserve
component_groups.economic_claim: Consulting commoditization and margin compression stress
component_groups.valuation_basis: Bounded negative reserve; not full enterprise value haircut.
component_groups.adjustments: Partial dhando: AI could compress FCF faster than low-growth scenario.

total_return_panel.error: Vendor events are discovery evidence; primary-source completeness has not been established.
total_return_panel.return_contract: split-adjusted close excluding dividends; event amounts normalized for later splits; cash reinvested at ex-date close; pre-tax nominal

coverage.note: Vendor events are discovery evidence; primary-source completeness has not been established.

component_review_queue.decision_rule: Each assigned rater records accept, challenge, or reject with a proposed range and evidence. The aggregator may not silently average disputed ranges.

items.label: Consulting and managed-services owner-cash engine
mandatory_checks: Is the valuation method appropriate for this economic claim?
Is the security's ownership claim and economic-unit denominator reconciled correctly?
Does the evidence support the low/base/high range and its timing?
Are comparable assets truly like-for-like after production, contract, location, capital, ownership, and realization adjustments?
For an option, are success probability, time to realization, and remaining owner-funded capital explicit?
Is the component additive, or already embedded in another component?
What observation would move the base estimate materially?

valuation_method_route.label: High-return compounder
failure_modes: growth projected without its capital cost
terminal value unsupported by a durable mechanism
valuation_method_route.decision_rule: Use one primary method and no more than two corroborating methods; irrelevant methods and personas remain silent.

method_route.label: High-return compounder
failure_modes: growth projected without its capital cost
terminal value unsupported by a durable mechanism
method_route.decision_rule: Use one primary method and no more than two corroborating methods; irrelevant methods and personas remain silent.

valuation.interpretation: value_per_share is withheld while any material additive component is unpriced; priced_components_per_share is not a complete security value.

scenario_contract.rule: Cases must change cited causal operating, capital, probability, timing, or financing drivers—not only a terminal multiple.

falsifiers: Primary evidence shows claim, cash conversion, or capital structure is materially worse than low case.

Primary evidence shows claim, cash conversion, or capital structure is materially worse than low case.
required_refresh_triggers: new filing or material operating update

change_control.rule: A source fact is locked. Every assumption change requires a reason, author, timestamp, and before/after value.

universal_valuation_contract.decision_rule: No security is decision-grade until every material claim is valued exactly once by a valid calculation proof and every material evidence blocker is resolved.

paths.label: Growth theory (pre-falsifier)
paths.weight_why: Segment blend before falsifier pass; diagnostic only when it differs from falsifier-adjusted.
weight_falsifiers: Included at full weight alongside falsifier-adjusted without divergence note

paths.label: Bear scenario (Lawrence)
paths.weight_why: Downside stress; low weight because bear is a sensitivity, not a competing explanation of base mechanics.
weight_falsifiers: Bear assumptions become base case in filings (e.g. sustained volume collapse)
paths.hard_to_vary: yes: asymmetric low weight is structural

paths.label: Bull scenario (Lawrence)
paths.weight_why: Upside stress probe; higher than bear because optionality archetype has skew, but still below primary paths.
weight_falsifiers: Bull growth sustained in filings for 4+ quarters without falsifier trigger

qualitative_adjustments.factor: No dated predictive attribute at spot
qualitative_adjustments.rationale: Scarcity is descriptive; no timed mispricing catalyst in base
qualitative_adjustments.falsifier: Cross-check names dated catalyst with timeline

deutsch_checks.reach: Weights encode evidence tier (A primary → D external), not fitted to hit a target IRR

synthesis.notes: Capstone IRR combining filings, segments, overlays, third-party, qualitative

context_overlay.disclaimer: Context only. Tailwinds inform stance and overlay sizing; they do not auto-inflate Lawrence base IRR. Promotion to base case requires [HUMAN REVIEW].

insider_signal.disclaimer: Context only. Insider activity informs scenario confidence and stance discussion; it does not auto-inflate Lawrence base IRR. Promotion requires [HUMAN REVIEW].

scenario_confidence.note: Scenario weights are qualitative confidence only; Lawrence base IRR unchanged.

top_dissents.label: Mohnish Pabrai
top_dissents.falsifier: dhando -> none OR net-debt/EBITDA > 3 OR bear return < -15%

top_dissents.label: Joel Greenblatt
top_dissents.falsifier: FCF yield below universe median OR base IRR below median

lens_consensus.disclaimer: Advisory lens blend only. Does not replace Lawrence total-synthesis stance gate without [HUMAN REVIEW].
